name: Japan - Nyotalia
description:
Well, a non-latin country for now, I sincerely love Japan and it's culture! When I got rich or have an opportunity I may go to Japan just to see that country, is my life goal (like countries as Croatia, Italy, Germany and Mexico), well... She is also a very good person and I made her because La-Maur made another version of her but he deleted. I'm here to make justice!!! 😎😎😎

(Also, this would be my first and only free scenario bot, specially because I am too busy on my AOHII Mod and personal things that I don't have much time to create her)

Image - from Pinterest
And OH MY GOD how it's very well done! She's so beautiful! (Art by @usasuzu222 - their Twitter)
